mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sxlg_official_article (title, url, content, summary, category, publish_date, author, cover_image, view_count, crawl_status, crawl_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{url}, #{content}, #{summary}, #{category}, #{publishDate}, #{author}, #{coverImage}, #{viewCount}, #{crawlStatus}, #{crawlTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sxlg_official_article ORDER BY publish_date DESC
SELECT * FROM sxlg_official_article WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY publish_date DESC
SELECT * FROM sxlg_official_article WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY publish_date DESC
SELECT * FROM sxlg_official_article ORDER BY publish_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}
